channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Meliora Meadows Adjustments
item.description: Adjusts A LOT of mods, applying Aldi's Classes trait restrictions and disabling some jsons.

item.title: Fitting Room
item.description: Hover over an item of clothing and press a key to preview your character wearing it.

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Timber!
item.description: A mostly visual mod where trees fall over then drop their items.

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: fish(wastaken) Classes Patch
item.description: small personal patch for GlooMeClasses.

item.title: Signals
item.description: Signals is a WIP mod allowing player to design "pseudo analogic" circuits. It adds triodes, resis...

item.title: Smithing Plus_1.9.0-rc1_hotfix
item.description: Hotfix that addresses some lagspikes and crashing issues with SmithingPlus 1.9.0-rc1

item.title: Vintage Rift - Client
item.description: Client only code for the Vintage Rift server

item.title: VSReborn Server Patch
item.description: mega patch

item.title: Extreme Weathers [ALPHA]
item.description: Introduces new weather mechanics using the vanilla weather system.

item.title: Enhanced Thunder Sounds
item.description: Adds random sound variety to thunder — no more hearing the same 4 claps on repeat.

item.title: Death Exile
item.description: Value your life - death has consequences. Die and face a ban, ghost mode, or 24h exile.

item.title: Atlas
item.description: Integration testing for mods: xUnit scenarios against a real headless server, in your IDE and CI

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: Modular Backpacks
item.description: Makes vanilla backpacks modular, allowing you to attach addons to extend storage slots.

item.title: More Quarter Logs
item.description: Adds more quarter log variants.

item.title: More Polished Rocks
item.description: Adds more polished rocks variants and polished rock bricks.

item.title: More Ashlar Blocks
item.description: Adds more ashlar block variants.

item.title: Riley's Classes
item.description: Addon for Aldi's Classes, makes classes interact with other mods and adds new ones!

item.title: Boat Autopilot
item.description: Long boat trips in Vintage Story are beautiful… the first three times.

item.title: Infantry Dolabra
item.description: Adds a versatile multitool with switchable tool modes for mining, digging, and woodcutting

item.title: Auto Walk Extended
item.description: Toggle automatic walking, sprinting and sneaking. Supports also automatic climbing.

item.title: Ghaelen's Tweaks
item.description: My personal tweaks I like to play with.

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races

item.title: Salty´s Movement: Slow Walk
item.description: Immersive walking speed in cycles.

item.title: Extra Shelves
item.description: Adds a few variant of shelves like the game's shelves.

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: xSkills Fork
item.description: RPG-style skill system with abilities, perks, and progression.

item.title: Exotic Milk
item.description: Have you ever wanted milk from an entity that doesnt normally produce milk? Now's your chance!
